description: Configure, price, quote UI with top-level nav, operating principles, and component docs.
name: CPQ UI
prompt: Create a website that houses a series of patterns relevant to any web-based configure price quote software for specialty manufacturing. Features include data management via tabular native import, display, filter, and export interfaces, catalog selection and configuration flows, bill of materials and spec sheets, carts, quotes, and orders, dimensional canvas interfaces, as well as AI-accelerated features for search, support, and administration. The site should document each pattern, component, and token and provide a playground for customizing theme, app shell features, navigation, and generating sample data for each pattern.

ad: Our AI agent Macky helps you improve your system health.
description: Mac app download landing page. Glass hero with app preview and download CTA.
name: Macabre
prompt: Macabre is a macOS app that generates a health score for every volume (main volume only on the free tier) and tracks disk space over time. It identifies known culprits for storage abuse — especially Apple system files, backups, and caches — and surfaces specific directories where large files are written at a rapid rate exceeding defined thresholds.
